title: Project Miner Temp Power Production Tracking Baseline Live Admission
authority_basis: Jason's 2026-05-18 standing PM blocker authority as repo technical authority and project stakeholder.
objective: Clear the post-durable-field-record production tracking blocker by admitting one insert-only zero-actual Temp Power production tracking baseline record, without opening customer reporting, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance outputs.
preconditions: PM Lane 277 approval row reads back as approved_for_import_packet.
PM Lane 278 import reads back as imported with current_candidate_match=true and counts_match=true.
PM Lane 279 field authorization and assignment reads back as 184 assignments for 184 unique imported apparatus rows.
PM Lane 280 schedule/status readiness reads back as 15 ready tasks, 184 ready apparatus, 7 not_started workpackages, 184 assignments, and 0 issues.
PM Lane 281 durable field record reads back as durable_field_recorded with record_count=1 and production_quantity_count=0.
No existing production tracking baseline seam was present before PM Lane 282.
scope: Add production tracking record store adapters for memory and Supabase-backed stores.

Add focused tests for accepted zero-actual baseline write, idempotent replay, replay mismatch rejection, missing durable field record rejection, downstream authority widening rejection, and role rejection.
Extend deployed mutation-seam smoke coverage for production tracking route/readback registration.
Persist one deterministic PM Lane 282 production tracking baseline record after hosted deploy.
not_allowed: No labor entry or actual labor hour write.
No apparatus progress or progress update write.
No customer report, completion evidence, or customer commitment.
No billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance output.
No source workbook or PDF writeback.
No new service, DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
No autonomous AI business-state mutation beyond the single zero-actual production tracking baseline explicitly admitted here.
schema_plan: Apply migration 005 to runtime DSN without printing secrets.
Verify initial runtime production tracking record count is 0.
validation_plan: Hosted readback before live write: production tracking status reports no_production_tracking_record and storage_available=true.
Hosted live POST: accepted zero-actual production tracking baseline.
Hosted same-payload replay: idempotent_hit with no second record.
Hosted readback after replay: production_tracking_baseline_recorded and downstream customer/finance authorities not_admitted.
Hosted smokes: deployed mutation-seam smoke with PM intake, hosted PM intake smoke, hosted operations routes smoke.
local_validation_result: PASS: production tracking tests passed, durable field record tests passed, import persistence tests passed, approval persistence tests passed, py_compile passed, packet JSON parsed, and scoped git diff check passed.

hosted_execution_result.pre_write_status: direct mutation-seam and operations-web returned no_production_tracking_record, storage_available=true, record_count=0, durable_field_record_count=1, downstream customer/finance authorities not_admitted.
hosted_execution_result.final_status: direct mutation-seam and operations-web returned production_tracking_baseline_recorded, record_count=1, production_quantity_count=0, labor_entry_count=0, actual_labor_hours=0.00, apparatus_progress_count=0, progress_update_count=0, customer_reporting_authority/finance_authority not_admitted.

next_recommended_lane: After live production tracking baseline closeout, the next blocker is customer reporting and completion evidence admission after production tracking proof.
